title: jasminum sambac var. gimea
intro: Jasminum sambac var. gimea, also known as the Star of India or Gmelina jasmine, is a fragrant flowering vine that is native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Jasminum sambac var. gimea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine.
